zh.lifeSummary: 當Mauger Staunton於大約1132年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton32歲，母親Beatrice Muschamp28歲。他和Beatrix Belvoir至少有3個兒子。他於1170年住在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。他去世於1216年在英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦可享年85歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mauger Staunton于大约1132年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，他的父亲Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton32岁，母亲Beatrice Muschamp28岁。他和Beatrix Belvoir至少有3个儿子。他于1170年住在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。他去世于1216年在英国諾廷加姆爾內瓦可享年85岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Mauger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Channel Islands (Guernsey and Jersey): from the Old French (Norman) personal name Maug(i)er, Malg(i)er, from ancient Germanic Madalgar(i), Malger, composed of the elements madal ‘council, meeting’ and gar(i) ‘spear’, or from Amalgar(i), with the first element amal ‘capable, brave, eager’. Compare Major , Monger , and Munger .
Probably also an altered form of German   Mager  .

variants.name: Maugeri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Ignazio, Salvatore, Angelo, Camillo, Giuseppe, Orazio, Pietro.
variant of Malgeri, from the ancient Germanic personal name Madalgari or Amalgari (see Mauger ).

variants.name: Major
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Malg(i)er, Maug(i)er, an Old French form of ancient Germanic Madalgar(i) (see Mauger ).
Hungarian: from a shortened form of majorosgazda (see Majoros ) or a derivative of German Meyer .
Polish, Czech, and Slovak: from the military rank major (derived from Latin maior ‘greater’), a word related to English mayor and the German surname Meyer .

variants.name: Mangieri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Gaspar, Mario, Angelo, Arsenio, Mafalda, Orazio, Rocco, Silvio.
Italian: variant of Malgeri, from the ancient Germanic personal name Madalgari or Amalgari (see Mauger ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Mauger Staunton was born about 1132, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton, was 32 and his mother, Beatrice Muschamp, was 28. He had at least 3 sons with Beatrix Belvoir. He lived in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England in 1170. He died in 1216, in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mauger Staunton est né environ 1132, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Muschamp, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Beatrix Belvoir. Il a vécu à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre en 1170. Il est décédé en 1216, à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mauger Staunton um 1132 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton 32 und seine Mutter Beatrice Muschamp 28. Er hatte mit Beatrix Belvoir mindestens 3 Söhne. 1170 hat er in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1216 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mauger Staunton è nato il circa 1132 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Muschamp, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Beatrix Belvoir. Vissuto a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England nel 1170. Morì nel 1216, nel Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mauger Stauntonが約1132年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父Galfridus Geoffrey Stauntonは32歳，母Beatrice Muschampは28歳であった。彼はBeatrix Belvoirとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1170年にはイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムに住んでいた。彼は1216年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルクで85歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mauger Staunton(이)가 대략 1132년 영국 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Muschamp(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Beatrix Belvoir(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1170년도에 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 살았다. 그는 1216년 영국 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mauger Staunton nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Muschamp, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Beatrix Belvoir. Ele viveu em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra em 1170. Ele faleceu em 1216, em Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mauger Staunton родился около 1132 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Muschamp, 28. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Beatrix Belvoir. Он жил в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия в 1170 году. Он умер в 1216 г. в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mauger Staunton nació aproximadamente 1132, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Galfridus Geoffrey Staunton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrice Muschamp, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Beatrix Belvoir. Vivió en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra en 1170. Murió en 1216, en Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
